description: PANEL_HF DeepSeek-slot comparison: hf-deepseek-v3-2 (current) vs hf-deepseek-v3 (proposed). Three row groups: (a) hf-deepseek-v3-2 measured directly via the HF route on the trunk prompt (2026-05-06); (b) hf-deepseek-v3 measured directly via the HF route on the trunk prompt (2026-05-08); (c) openrouter-deepseek-v3.2 measured on the April-19 historical prompt — this third group is the stand-in that PR #182 cited as a proxy for hf-deepseek-v3-2 accuracy, included here so the route-vs-route discrepancy that motivated this swap is reproducible from committed data.

methodology.dataset: benchmark/dataset.json (v1+v2+v3, 187 entries with extraction_status=complete and not needs_manual_review)
methodology.note_on_or_standin: PR #182 cited this OR-route data as a stand-in for hf-deepseek-v3-2 under the noted assumption that "routing affects cost/latency but not accuracy." That assumption held for the OR deployment (which serves V3.2 in non-reasoning mode) but broke for the HF deployment (which serves V3.2 in reasoning mode and truncates at the 1000-token completion budget).
